{# stock_import_result.html — result banner after a vendor stock-list upload. Called by: import_vendor_stock_list (app/routers/htmx_views.py). Context: error (str|None); on success: vendor_name, imported_rows, skipped_rows, total_rows, warnings (list of {row, field, reason}). Swapped into #vendor-stock-result. Jinja auto-escapes all interpolations. #} {% if error %}
{{ error }}
{% else %}
Imported {{ imported_rows }} stock row{{ "s" if imported_rows != 1 }} for {{ vendor_name }} {% if skipped_rows %}({{ skipped_rows }} skipped){% endif %}.
{% if warnings %}

{{ warnings|length }} row{{ "s" if warnings|length != 1 }} skipped:

    {% for w in warnings[:25] %}
  • Row {{ w.row }}: {{ w.reason }}
    • {% endfor %} {% if warnings|length > 25 %}
  • …and {{ warnings|length - 25 }} more.
    • {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endif %}
